blobmount.description: Mount a blob storage as a filesystem.

cp.description: Copy files with blob storage support.

sysinfo.description: Print system, GPU, CUDA, MPI, and distributed-ML environment summary.

inject-alias.description: Insert or update the managed usm alias block in your shell rc file.

openai-proxy.description: Run a local OpenAI-compatible proxy that forwards to Microsoft TRAPI.
